ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the airline */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the airline */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the airline's headquarters */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the airline's headquarters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_models" (
  "aircraft_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft model */,
  "aircraft_model_name" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the aircraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "aircraft_model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft model */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the aircraft */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aircraft_aircraft_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_model_id") REFERENCES aircraft_models ("aircraft_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_types" (
  "flight_type_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each flight type */,
  "flight_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the flight type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flight type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_statuses" (
  "status_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each flight status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the flight status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flight status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancellation_reasons" (
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancellation reason */,
  "reason_code" TEXT /* Code for the cancellation reason */,
  "reason_description" TEXT /* Description of the cancellation reason */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departure_slots" (
  "slot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each departure slot */,
  "slot_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the departure slot */,
  "slot_status" TEXT /* Status of the departure slot (e.g., Available, Occupied) */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight assigned to the slot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("slot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parking_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parking position */,
  "position_designator" TEXT /* Designator of the parking position */,
  "position_type" TEXT /* Type of the parking position (e.g., Nose-in, Drive through) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the parking position (number of aircraft it can accommodate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, operator, ground crew) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the flight data */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the flight data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
column_names: Country code of the airline's headquarters
